name: punctuation whitespace and case are stripped
CJK Han letters and fullwidth digits are kept
combining marks in non-Latin scripts are kept
mixed scripts preserve letters numbers and marks in order
NFKC compatibility forms normalize before filtering
non-Latin casefold maps sigma variants together
full casefold expands Greek iota dialytika tonos
full casefold expands Greek upsilon dialytika tonos
full casefold expands polytonic Greek alpha with ypogegrammeni
surrogate-pair codepoints are processed as codepoints
zero-length canonical form is possible but unbindable
